full_text:
Hua Rong (Derui) иҸҜиһҚ (еҫ·и•Ө)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hua Rong (иҸҜиһҚ), styledDerui (еҫ·и•Ө). Forced by Teng Yin to write against Sun Lin but refused to forge orders. Hua Rong was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Hua Rong lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
